steps.t: You helped Mêshaget and defeated the dwarf-wight he was fighting. You should talk to him.
This prominent stone grave must belong to Semayâti the Unyielding. You should open it and see what awaits inside.
You have found the journal of Semayâti the Unyielding, the famous engineer from Lâkindar of old. You should take the journal out of her stone resting …
You have the journal of Semayâti the Unyielding, the famous engineer from Lâkindar of old. You should talk to Mêshaget.
